summary: Mirror the active execution-plan rewrite into docs/exec-plans/active/current.md.
reason: The roadmap changed the active execution plan and the companion execution-plan file was missing, so the docs drift was real.

summary: Change normalize_title to match the promotion path tokenization.
reason: This was not a proven correctness bug in the active path. The existing normalization only fed a soft near-duplicate check and did not justify churn by itself.

summary: Print a shell-neutral next-step pipeline command instead of a Windows-only path.
reason: This was a real portability improvement and cheap to fix safely.

summary: Fix gh api pagination so json.loads does not receive multiple JSON documents.
reason: The existing legacy gh fetch path could break on multi-page PR comment sets because --paginate was used without --slurp.

summary: Do not drop resolved or outdated MCP review threads.
reason: This is a learning-policy choice rather than a clear code bug. The filter was intentional to reduce stale or noisy signals in the intake lane.

summary: Fail closed on malformed candidate rows instead of silently dropping them.
reason: Silently filtering malformed rows makes bad artifacts look valid and weakens the promotion boundary.

summary: Always write automation-summary.json even if one child step fails.
reason: The summary was being lost at the exact time it was most needed for debugging or resume behavior.

summary: Treat empty --score-review-text as missing input instead of scoring an empty string.
reason: Whitespace-only review text is not meaningful benchmark input and should not quietly pass the gate.

summary: Do not lowercase file paths during deduplication.
reason: Lowercasing paths can merge distinct targets on case-sensitive filesystems.

summary: The bounded fix executor cannot really enforce a file allowlist under workspace-write mode.
reason: The code only guided the model with target files; it did not have a real execution boundary. The safe fix was to refuse apply mode until that boundary exists.

summary: Reject malformed candidate and corpus rows instead of silently skipping them.
reason: The quality gate should fail fast on corrupt artifacts rather than scoring incomplete evidence.

summary: Add a timeout to the Hugging Face dataset fetch.
reason: A hanging network call should not be able to stall the hardening lane indefinitely.

summary: Use BOM-tolerant decoding when loading the external corpus.
reason: The rest of the scoring path had already become BOM-tolerant, so this loader needed to match.

summary: Make the npm tarball version match the bundle version override.
reason: Producing a zip and npm tarball with mismatched versions from one release run is a real packaging defect.

summary: Run npm pack from the repo root so it packages the intended package.json.
reason: The script was otherwise path-anchored, but npm pack still depended on the caller's working directory.
Missing values were turning into confusing downstream path resolution errors instead of a clear CLI error.

summary: Merge marketplace.json entries instead of overwriting the file with only this plugin.
reason: Replacing the full manifest can silently delete other plugin entries in the same marketplace.
